# terrible_community_general_github_issue (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `issue` (Number) Issue number for which information is required.
- `organization` (String) Name of the GitHub organization in which the repository is hosted.
- `repo` (String) Name of repository from which issue needs to be retrieved.

### Optional

- `action` (String) Get various details about issue depending upon action specified.

### Read-Only

- `issue_status` (String) State of the GitHub issue.
